Quality Education.reason: The course directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) in Turkish, developing essential language skills (Target 4.4) and fostering an appreciation for cultural diversity through its content (Target 4.7).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is co-taught by a Turkish native speaker and a local teacher, explicitly demonstrating international cooperation and capacity-building in education, aligning with Target 17.9.
